title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero of Cursor discusses how companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and describes agentic workflows built across the entire software development lifecycle, including bug triage, security review, and growth experiment automation. The talk emphasizes that breaking through the productivity plateau requires addressing broader SDLC bottlenecks beyond code writing and deploying autonomous agent teams for PM, engineering management, and risk detection tasks.
